title: Enhancing Stability for Large Models Training in Constrained Bandwidth Networks
authors: Yun Dai, Tejas Dharamsi, Byron Hsu, Tao Song, Hamed Firooz (LinkedIn)
one_liner: Finds and fixes a GPU race condition in ZeRO++ hpZ that silently breaks 40B-70B LLM training on low-bandwidth clusters.

title: Scaling Down, Serving Fast: Compressing and Deploying Efficient LLMs for Recommendation Systems
authors: K. Behdin, A. Fatahibaarzi, Q. Song, Y. Dai, A. Gupta, Z. Wang, et al. (LinkedIn / MIT)
one_liner: LinkedIn's playbook for shrinking a 100B+ RecSys LLM 20x via distillation, structured pruning, and FP8 quant, then serving it fast.

title: WorldCuisines: A Massive-Scale Benchmark for Multilingual and Multicultural Visual Question Answering on Global Cuisines
authors: G. Winata, F. Hudi, P. A. Irawan, D. Anugraha, R. A. Putri et al. (60+ authors; senior authors incl. D. I. Adelani, A. Oh, A. F. Aji, T. Watanabe, C.-W. Ngo)
one_liner: 1M-sample VQA benchmark probing whether vision-language models recognize dishes and origins across 30 languages and 189 countries.

title: Reinforcement Learning: An Overview
one_liner: Kevin Murphy's 250-page modern RL monograph: value/policy/model-based, multi-agent, and a deep LLMs-and-RL chapter (RLHF, RLVR, PPO/GRPO/DPO).

title: Beyond Visual Fidelity: Benchmarking Super-Resolution Models for Large-Scale Remote Sensing Imagery via Downstream Task Integration
authors: Zhili Li, Kangyang Chai, Zhihao Wang, Xiaowei Jia, Yanhua Li, Gengchen Mai, Sergii Skakun, Dinesh Manocha, Yiqun Xie
one_liner: Satellite super-resolution benchmark showing PSNR/SSIM gains often fail to, and can inversely, predict downstream task utility.

title: Beyond Visual Fidelity: Benchmarking Super-Resolution Models for Large-Scale Remote Sensing Imagery via Downstream Task Integration
authors: Zhili Li, Kangyang Chai, Zhihao Wang, Xiaowei Jia, Yanhua Li, Gengchen Mai, Sergii Skakun, Dinesh Manocha, Yiqun Xie
venue: arXiv 2026 (v2); under review at IEEE TPAMI
one_liner: A remote-sensing super-resolution benchmark that scores SR models by downstream task utility, not just PSNR/SSIM.

title: Code as Agent Harness: Toward Executable, Verifiable, and Stateful Agent Systems
authors: X. Ning, K. Tieu, D. Fu, T. Wei et al. (UIUC, Meta, Stanford); senior authors H. Tong, J. He, T. Zhang
one_liner: Survey reframing code as the operational "harness" for LLM agents: reasoning, acting, state, verification, and multi-agent coordination.

title: Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini
authors: Gemini Embedding Team, Google DeepMind (M. Shanbhogue, Z. Li, S. Zhang, G. Hernández Ábrego, et al.)
one_liner: Google's native multimodal embedding model: one Gemini-initialized encoder maps text, image, video, and audio into a shared vector space.

title: CockroachDB: The Resilient Geo-Distributed SQL Database
authors: R. Taft, I. Sharif, A. Matei, N. VanBenschoten, J. Lewis, et al. (Cockroach Labs)
one_liner: How CockroachDB delivers serializable, geo-distributed SQL transactions on commodity clouds without atomic clocks.

title: Data-Driven Science and Engineering: Machine Learning, Dynamical Systems, and Control (2nd ed.)
authors: S. L. Brunton, J. N. Kutz
one_liner: The canonical Brunton-Kutz textbook tying SVD, sparsity, ML, dynamical systems, control, ROMs, and physics-informed ML into one toolkit.

title: How to Scale Your Model: A Systems View of LLMs on TPUs
authors: Jacob Austin, Sholto Douglas, Roy Frostig, Anselm Levskaya, Charlie Chen, Reiner Pope, et al. (Google DeepMind)
one_liner: A first-principles, roofline-driven playbook for scaling Transformer training and inference across thousands of TPUs (and GPUs).

title: LLM Query Scheduling with Prefix Reuse and Latency Constraints
authors: G. Dexter, S. Tang, A. Fatahi Baarzi, Q. Song, T. Dharamsi, A. Gupta (LinkedIn; Nubank)
one_liner: Theory + algorithm for scheduling LLM queries under prefix-cache reuse and TTFT limits; k-LPM cuts P99 latency vs FCFS/LPM.
